errors.invalid-credential: Please check your email or password.
errors.wrong-password: Please check your email or password.
errors.user-not-found: We couldn’t find an account matching that information.
errors.email-already-in-use: This email is already registered. Sign in or use a different email.
errors.weak-password: Your password must be at least 6 characters long.
errors.user-disabled: This account is currently unavailable. Please contact support.
errors.too-many-requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.network-request-failed: Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request is taking too long. Please try again.
errors.requires-recent-login: For security reasons, please sign in again.
errors.user-token-expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.operation-not-allowed: This sign-in method is currently unavailable.
errors.account-exists-with-different-credential: This email is already linked to another sign-in method. Please use that method to sign in.
errors.popup-blocked: The sign-in window was blocked. Please allow pop-ups and try again.
errors.popup-closed-by-user: The sign-in window was closed before completion.
errors.web-storage-unsupported: Sign-in is not available with your current browser settings.
errors.unauthorized-domain: Sign-in is not available on this domain.
errors.internal-error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.default: We couldn’t complete the sign-in. Please try again later.
